To The Sea- Short Film

In 2016, he shot a short film called "To The Sea" with the Short Film Production Support of the General Directorate of Cinema. To the Sea was screened at over 100 festivals. It won many awards, especially Best Director, Best Production.

2014 /
											2016

Atlantik Film

He worked as an assistant director in over 100 TV commercials. During this period, he also took part as an assistant director in Reha Erdem's movie named Koca Dünya.
